description: The Kyokuto-kai is a yakuza organization based in Tokyo, Japan, founded by Aiji Sekiguchi. It was registered as a designated yakuza group under the Organized Crime Countermeasures Law in July 1993. In the early 2000s, it was involved in a feud with the rival Matsuba-kai, leading to shootings. As of the article, it has about 300 members and is led by Jin Takahashi.
